    "Excavation/digging is being conducted without an active 811 utility locate ticket",
    "Lack of visible paint, flag, or electronic marking indicating underground utility verification"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Issue an immediate Stop Work Order on all excavation activities",
    "Evacuate the immediate digging area until safety can be verified",
    "Contact the local 811 center to submit an emergency or standard locate request",
    "Verify the presence of any underground utilities using non-destructive methods once locates are marked"
  ],
  "rationale": "Digging without an active 811 locate ticket is a critical safety violation and non-compliant with CGA Best Practices. It poses an immediate risk of utility strikes, which can cause severe injury, death, property damage, and system outages.",

    "CGA (Common Ground Alliance) Best Practices",
    "OSHA 29 CFR 1926.651(b)"
  ]
